owners: kernel ports and application services own business rules
invariants: Approval APIs do not execute tools directly.
Resume executes pending tools from checkpoint through ToolGatewayPort.
Kernel depends only on ports and domain objects.
Approval and checkpoint statuses use enums.
compatBoundary: Existing agent run APIs and constructors remain compatible; new behavior is exposed through additive ports, services, adapters, and endpoints.
nonGoals: No resource ACL implementation in this slice.
